summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated login page with professional Arabic design and admin-only user management functionality

Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

Login form with email and password fields on left side
No registration option present (admin-only user creation confirmed)

Login functionality works with admin credentials
Successful redirect to dashboard after login
Users tab navigation and Add User dialog functionality
User creation dialog opens and closes properly
Logout functionality redirects to login page
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
